name: Boardly
strengths: Flexible, familiar UI, quick to start
weaknesses: Not CS-specific; no usage triggers; manual handoffs

name: NoteDock
weaknesses: No automation from product events; silos between docs and tasks
notes: Often used to write playbooks but not to run them

name: SheetOps
weaknesses: Error-prone, single point of failure, no reminders
notes: Frequent starting point for small CS teams

name: GrowthSight Core
approach: All-in-one CS suite with reporting and health scores
weaknesses: Heavy implementation, admin overhead, slow to realize value
notes: Wins when reporting/BI is the priority

name: VitalTrack
notes: Beats lightweight tools when analytics drive the decision

name: CatalyzeCS
strengths: Broader CS features than generic tools
weaknesses: Requires admin to maintain; slower setup
notes: Stronger for multi-team processes; less nimble for quick onboarding fixes
